Hydra Scheduler — Logging and Alerts

Hydra Scheduler logs every task execution including the dispatched command, container image, exit code, stderr stream, and total task duration. Failed Hydra Scheduler tasks trigger alerts over operator-configured channels (email, Slack, PagerDuty). Hydra Scheduler tasks that exceed their declared duration budget log a soft warning every five minutes until the task completes or hits its hard timeout. The Hydra Scheduler task history is retained for 90 days for post-mortem analysis.
